name: Capitol Punishment (Chili)
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Beef chuck, cut into 1/4 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add paprika, oregano, MSG, chili powder, cumin, beef bouillon, beer, and 2 cups water.
2. Let simmer.
3. In a separate skillet, brown ground meat in batches of 1 lb or 1 1/2 lbs. Brown beef cubes in the grease from browned ground meat. Drain all the meat and add it to the simmering spices. Continue until all the meat is done.
4. Saute chopped onions and garlic in 1 tablespoon oil.
5. Add the sauteed onion and garlic mixture to the meat-spice mixture.
6. Add water as needed.
7. Simmer for 2 hours.
8. Add sugar, coriander seed, hot sauce, and tomato sauce. Simmer for an additional 45 minutes.
9. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm water to form a paste. Stir the paste into the chili.
10. Add salt to taste. Simmer for another 30 minutes.
11. Add more Louisiana red hot sauce if desired for extra heat.
